summary: Testing complete for new features: Social share buttons (landing), cashback withdrawal (backend + frontend), admin payment logos CRUD. Fixed critical bug in payments.py (payload['id'] → payload['sub']). All tests passing.

fixed.issue: JWT payload used 'id' key but auth module uses 'sub' key
fixed.fix: Changed payload['id'] to payload['sub'] on lines 762, 905, 993
fixed.impact: Withdrawal endpoints were returning 500 Internal Server Error

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working. Withdrawal endpoint fixed and tested. Test client balance is now GHS 1.83 (after test withdrawal of GHS 5). Payment logos CRUD all working.

Client_Withdrawal.POST /api/payments/withdrawal/initiate: ✅ Working (returns pending status in test mode)
Client_Withdrawal.Withdrawal_Modal: ✅ Opens with phone, network, amount fields
Client_Withdrawal.Insufficient_Balance_Check: ✅ Returns error if balance too low

bug_fixed.description: Withdrawal endpoint was returning 500 Internal Server Error due to JWT payload key mismatch
bug_fixed.root_cause: payments.py was using payload['id'] but auth.py creates tokens with 'sub' as the user ID key
